title: Will Trump make 0 trips to Mar-a-Lago as President in Jun 2026?

current.lean_note: 78pt gap exceeds the hard ceiling (20pt) — beyond this divergence from a liquid market, even high confidence is treated as model error, not edge
current.rationale_summary: Based on the evidence, Trump has a history of visiting Mar-a-Lago for political and personal reasons, and there is a report indicating he is headed back to Mar-a-Lago for a crypto conference. However, the question specifically focuses on whether he will make 0 trips in June 2026, and there is no direct confirmation of a trip during this exact timeframe. The uncertainty lies in the timing and purpo
key_drivers: Report of Trump heading back to Mar-a-Lago for a crypto conference
Historical pattern of frequent visits to Mar-a-Lago
Lack of direct confirmation of a trip in June 2026
Uncertainty regarding political and personal schedules
reference_classes: Political figure visitation habits to personal properties

history.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 88%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: Mar-a-Lago is seasonally closed in summer (Trump made zero June visits in every first-term year), zero trips have occurred through mid-June, and Iran-war management plus G7 travel keep him DC-anchored, making 0 trips the strongly modal outcome.
key_drivers: Iran war keeps him in DC

history.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 82%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: Summer = Bedminster not Mar-a-Lago (skips Florida heat); Iran war kept him in DC through the June 14 ceasefire; no reported June trip. 0 trips most likely.
key_drivers: Iran war kept him in DC

adversarial_concerns: Divergence from liquid market implies unaccounted information; two sources may not outweigh crowd-sourced market wisdom
Base rate of unscheduled trips assumed zero but historical data may show non-zero occurrences
Seasonal closure logic assumes strict adherence without considering exceptional circumstances
history.rationale_summary: Strong evidence of zero visits from June 1-23 (two independent sources) combined with Mar-a-Lago's seasonal closure during summer months. Only ~7 days remain in June, but the closure reduces likelihood of last-week visits. Key uncertainty is potential unscheduled trip, though base rate of ~0 summer
key_drivers: Zero recorded visits in first 23 days
